title: Bridge Essay: The neurobiology of altered states of consciousness induced by drumming and other rhythmic sound patterns.
concept: Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Language/Mantra** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Mantra — inner speech, focused attention meditation, chanting neural effects.

**The neurobiology of altered states of consciousness induced by drumming and other rhythmic sound patterns.** - Ann N Y Acad Sci (2025). DOI: 10.1111/nyas.15403. PMID: 40668575. Humans have long sought to alter their mental states through various cultural practices, with rhythmic sounds emerging as a prominent and enduring method. However, altered states of consciousness induced by rhythmic auditory stimulation have not been comprehensively addressed in academic research, and the associated cognitive and neural underpinnings remain enigmatic. This narrative review synthesizes the behavioral, cognitive, and neural correlates underlying nonordinary experiences elicited by
